73782.subject: THE MENT TECH INTELLIGENCE BRIEF
73782.body:
Ment Tech | Meant To Innovate

Автор: Ment Tech


Автор: Ment Tech

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ment-tech-intelligence-brief-menttechlabs-eg70f?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3B5Oj9ZeYXSJWIuH4fv9jtXA%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=36OsU4e6FuIsg1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mpqy6ldx~rg-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mpqy6ldx-rg
  
This week, Wall Street moved its entire securities clearing infrastructure onto a public blockchain. OpenAI filed quietly for the most anticipated IPO in tech history. Enterprise AI crossed from pilot to autonomous production. A privacy regulator ruled against the world's most used AI product. And a landmark enterprise AI acquisition reshaped the European market. Five developments. Each one changes how the next phase of AI and blockchain infrastructure gets built. Here is what every founder, enterprise operator, and investor building in this space needs to understand. ◆  DEVELOPMENT 01 Wall Street Just Put $114 Trillion on a Public Blockchain. DTCC Chose Stellar. The Implications Are Enormous. What happened:On May 27, 2026, the Depository Trust & Clearing Corporation the institution that processes $2.5 quadrillion in U.S. securities transactions annually and oversees more than $114 trillion in custodied assets announced it will connect its tokenized securities platform to the Stellar public blockchain. DTC-custodied assets including Russell 1000 stocks, major index ETFs, and U.S. Treasury bonds will be available as tokenized instruments on Stellar by H1 2027. Limited production trading begins July 2026. A full commercial rollout is scheduled for October 2026. The initiative includes participation from over 50 major financial institutions JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, BlackRock, Bank of America, Ondo Finance, Fireblocks, and Kraken among them. Why it changes the build environment:This is the most significant institutional validation of public blockchain infrastructure since Bitcoin ETF approval. DTCC is not running a pilot. It is moving $114 trillion in custodied assets onto an open ledger under a regulatory framework that already has SEC clearance. Post-trade settlement compresses from T+1 to near-instantaneous finality. Collateral is freed. Markets can operate outside standard trading hours. And DTCC has confirmed this is a multi-chain strategy Stellar is the first node, not the only one. The Ment Tech perspective:Every RWA tokenization platform, every digital asset exchange, and every financial technology product built today is now operating in a market where Wall Street's own clearing infrastructure is moving on-chain. The question is no longer whether institutional tokenization is real. It is whether your infrastructure is built t

73778.subject: 📈 Dell shatters earnings, share price surges.
73778.body:
Today’s newsletter is brought to you by **[Choose Rich Live](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**[!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)

Our very own Nick O’Neill is has launched a new stream covering crypto, finance, AI, tech, and the stories shaping the internet economy.

If you already follow Nick, you know what to expect: sharp takes, market chaos, founder brain, and the occasional banger you’ll see clipped on the timeline five minutes later.

Episodes will be streaming live on YouTube, so make sure you’re subscribed to catch the next one as it happens.

**[Subscribe to Choose Rich Live!](https://www.youtube.com/@chooserichnick/streams)**

———————————————————————————

## Top Stories

**BTC** $73,570 (0.5%) | **ETH** $2,010 (1.3%) | **SOL** $82 (1.8%)

* [Dell gains 35%](https://finance.yahoo.com/quote/DELL/) post-market after earnings call and is now [up 57% ](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2060118019607552111?s=20)since Trump said to buy the stock on May 8th

* ICE (NYSE parent co.) CEO calls Hyperliquid [“bigger than NASDAQ”](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2060320489382302160?s=20) — HYPE hits [new ATH](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2060141338020946410?s=20) vs BTC, ETH, and SOL

* Anthropic releases [Opus 4.8](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2060040905021603892?s=20) — [Mythos coming](https://x.com/zoomerfied/status/2060043408446534077?s=20) in “a few weeks” 

* US and Iran are close to [agreeing on a deal](https://x.com/tradfi/status/2060001397953974366?s=20)

* S&P closes at new [ATH of $7,563](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2060089053765140703?s=20) — NASDAQ closes at [ATH of $26,917](https://x.com/tokens/status/2060090478612418646?s=20)

* Strategy [moves ~$30M](https://x.com/lookonchain/status/2060181007844979024?s=20) worth of BTC to Coinbase as Saylor explains why they could potentially [sell Bitcoin](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2060094257432506647?s=20)

* [PCE inflation](https://x.com/KobeissiLetter/status/2059976108737475056?s=20) hits highs not seen since 2023

* Trump admin to put Trump on [$250 bill](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2059992799190077613?s=20)

* SEC [grants Paxos approval](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2060244571733250458?s=20) to clear and settle securities transactions

* SpaceX lowers IPO target to $1.8T

* SpaceX pre-IPO market on Hyperliquid [wicks down 45%](https://x.com/WuBlockchain/status/2060188182424256887?s=20) due to bad oracle data and liquidates many traders

* An AI consultant company reveals one company [spent $500M](https://x.com/gurgavin/status/2060092913522978830?s=20) on Anthropic AI tools in a single month

* SUI network [experiences outage](https://x.com/DegenerateNews/status/2060071137321668633?s=20)

* Blue Origin rocket [explodes](https://x.com/WatcherGuru/status/2060166995388092470?s=20) during static fire test

* Anthropic [raises $65B](https://x.com/solidintel_x/status/2060098503058051159?s=

Fear and Greed has dropped to
33
(Fear)
and BTC is near
$73K
this morning after falling another 3% yesterday. Yesterday saw
the largest single-day Bitcoin ETF outflow since January, with
JPMorgan attributing the move to a broad retreat from the
debasement trade as Iran peace deal expectations reduced
safe-haven demand.

The market is under real pressure. But this weekend marks a
structural shift: CME futures go 24/7, permanently ending the
weekend gap pattern traders have tracked for years. Change is
happening even as sentiment hits its lowest point in months.

Let's dive in.

Latest News
-----------

The First US Spot BNB ETF Just Launched

VanEck listed the first US spot BNB ETF on Nasdaq under the
ticker VBNB on May 29, giving investors regulated access to the
fourth-largest cryptocurrency through a standard brokerage
account.

BNB has been roughly flat over the past year while most Layer 1
peers posted significant declines.

What on-chain activity metrics does VanEck cite to support BNB's
resilience?

Read More  
( https://link.coinmarketcap.com/f/a/zxB-ZcNvTSVDE3dVUBmHYw~~/AAQRxRA~/tfRd4puT7kPEzBp0NWNeNvasJKbiZ1Xs3yPtFCOSb_VNnk0j57qo5TTu8jm_jDJ6R6EOf1MBGy26DyDqAccOS4ZzoibnEMa5A8xy8EA8AqT7aZvNZ7mocoIX5zA5G4Gl68kZ74ZwR-O3xpw3q4B_WyVuCdUgErOkkWpc1QG9bVsgEz2mhHG1DZJ0valNmWEXxwgkxpFteZWiNCCLW5XFcg~~ )
   Standard Chartered Kept Its ETH Target and Cited Amazon

Standard Chartered m
